description: Middle East healthcare platform for booking doctor appointments. Patients can find doctors, read reviews, and book appointments online. Operates in Egypt, Saudi Arabia, Jordan, Lebanon, and Kenya.
business_model: B2B - Marketplace to healthcare providers, free to patients
key_investors: Gulf Capital, Beco Capital, Silicon Badia, Vostok New Ventures
competitive_advantage: Regional leader in MENA, multi-country presence, growing market

varden_fit.rationale: MENA healthcare infrastructure - demonstrates emerging market opportunity
